items.label: Post pre-match thread
items.description: Manually post the pre-match thread for the current or next match

items.label: Post match thread
items.description: Manually post the match thread for the current or next match

items.label: Post post-match thread
items.description: Manually post the post-match thread for the current or previous match

items.label: Post Man of the Match thread
items.description: Manually post the Man of the Match thread for the current or previous match

items.label: Post/refresh ticket thread
items.description: Post or refresh the monthly ticket thread for the current relevant month

items.label: Unsticky ticket thread (skip month)
items.description: Unsticky the current ticket thread and skip the relevant month

items.label: Reset thread markers (dev)
items.description: Clear dedup markers so match threads can be re-posted during testing

teamId.label: ESPN team ID
teamId.helpText: ESPN soccer team ID whose schedule the bot follows (191 = San Jose Earthquakes).

createThreads.label: Auto-create these threads
createThreads.helpText: Which threads the bot creates automatically. Unselect a type to stop the bot posting it. Match threads are per-match; the ticket thread is the monthly stickied thread, and news posts are based on the latest articles from the official website.

prematchLeadHours.label: Pre-match thread lead time (hours)
prematchLeadHours.helpText: How many hours before kickoff to post the pre-match thread. Defaults to 12.

matchLeadHours.label: Match thread lead time (hours)
matchLeadHours.helpText: How many hours before kickoff to post the match thread. Defaults to 1.

activeWindowDays.label: Post-match active window (days)
activeWindowDays.helpText: How many days to keep the post-match thread stickied and the MOTM thread moderated before unstickying and potentially locking both. Defaults to 1 day.

lockInactiveThreads.label: Lock inactive match threads
lockInactiveThreads.helpText: Whether to lock each match thread once its active window has passed (pre-match once the match thread posts, match once the post-match/MOTM threads post, and post-match/MOTM at the end of their active window).

flairPreMatch.label: Pre-match thread flair text
flairPreMatch.helpText: Exact text of the link flair to apply to pre-match threads.

flairMatch.label: Match thread flair text
flairMatch.helpText: Exact text of the link flair to apply to match threads.

flairPostMatch.label: Post-match thread flair text
flairPostMatch.helpText: Exact text of the link flair to apply to post-match threads.

flairMotm.label: Man of the Match thread flair text
flairMotm.helpText: Exact text of the link flair to apply to Man of the Match threads.

flairTicket.label: Ticket thread flair text
flairTicket.helpText: Exact text of the link flair to apply to the monthly ticket thread.

flairNews.label: News post flair text
flairNews.helpText: Exact text of the link flair to apply to news article posts.

newsBaseUrl.label: News site base URL
newsBaseUrl.helpText: Base URL of the Earthquakes website (no trailing slash).

newsPath.label: News page path
newsPath.helpText: Path to the news listing page, appended to the base URL.

newsMaxArticles.label: Max news articles per check
newsMaxArticles.helpText: How many of the most recent articles to consider each run. Defaults to 10.
